title: Surface detected command candidates in onboarding notice and exploring question
action: Wire detectCommands (harness10-1) into commandsNotices(repoRoot) in onboard_bee.mjs (~line 266, the 'No standard commands recorded' notice): when .bee/config.json lacks commands and candidates exist, the notice lists them as pre-filled proposals (key: value — source) for the agent to present as one confirmation question; when no candidates, the notice stays as today. Never write commands from the onboarding script itself — the agent writes only user-confirmed values (per D3). Leave the local COMMAND_KEYS duplicate in onboard_bee.mjs untouched (the existing drift test guards it; unifying is out of slice scope). Vendoring: commands_detect.mjs rides the existing templates/lib copy step automatically; confirm the existing lib verbatim-copy assertion loop in test_onboard_bee.mjs picks it up — do not write a redundant assertion. Update skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md step 1: the command question becomes confirm-the-detected-candidates (one message, pre-filled, still skippable), falling back to the open question when detection finds nothing; the SKILL names the exact invocation (node .bee/bin/lib/commands_detect.mjs) so later sessions can run detection without onboarding; keep the never-invent sentence and the write-confirmed-values-to-config instruction. Extend test_onboard_bee.mjs: notice carries candidates on a fixture repo with package.json, notice unchanged when no manifests, nothing written to config.json by apply.

truths: Onboarding apply on a manifest-bearing repo with empty commands surfaces candidate proposals in the notice and writes none of them to config.json
Onboarding on a repo with no manifests shows the existing capture notice unchanged

artifacts.substantive: step 1 command question is confirm-detected with open-question fallback, names the runnable detector command, never-invent retained, confirmed values still written to .bee/config.json commands

prohibitions: No automatic writes of detected values to .bee/config.json (user confirmation is the only write path per D3)
No change to existing consent-flow behavior (plan/apply semantics, idempotency)

trace.outcome: Detected command candidates now ride the onboarding notice (key: value — source, propose-only per D3, never written to config by the script); exploring SKILL step 1 becomes confirm-detected via node .bee/bin/lib/commands_detect.mjs with open-question fallback, never-invent retained; tests cover candidate notice, no-manifest fallback, and no-write-to-config
